scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/frontend && npm run test -w templates/service-template && npm run test:agents
scripts.validate: npm run migrations:validate && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:all
scripts.build:vite: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/frontend && node scripts/sync-vercel-output.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build:vite && npm run build:api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
